'''chajovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focalizer|focalizer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focalizer|focalizer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chajovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæjeveth|chæjeveth]] || [[word:chæjevej|chæjevej]] || [[word:chæjevesh|chæjevesh]] || [[word:chæjeve|chæjeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chajojovoth|chajojovoth]] || [[word:chajojovoj|chajojovoj]] || [[word:chajojovosh|chajojovosh]] || [[word:chajojovo|chajojovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chajovoth|chajovoth]] || [[word:chajovoj|chajovoj]] || [[word:chajovosh|chajovosh]] || [[word:chajovo|chajovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chajofvoth|chajofvoth]] || [[word:chajofvoj|chajofvoj]] || [[word:chajofvosh|chajofvosh]] || [[word:chajofvof|chajofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chajovotho|chajovotho]] || [[word:chajovojo|chajovojo]] || [[word:chajovosho|chajovosho]] || [[word:chajovoko|chajovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chajovoth|chajovoth]] || [[word:chajovoj|chajovoj]] || [[word:chajovosh|chajovosh]] || [[word:chajovo|chajovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chajovothol|chajovothol]] || [[word:chajovojol|chajovojol]] || [[word:chajovoshol|chajovoshol]] || [[word:chajovokol|chajovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chajovothotho|chajovothotho]] || [[word:chajovojojo|chajovojojo]] || [[word:chajovoshosho|chajovoshosho]] || [[word:chajovoko|chajovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chajovothon|chajovothon]] || [[word:chajovojon|chajovojon]] || [[word:chajovoshon|chajovoshon]] || [[word:chajovokon|chajovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chajovothoro|chajovothoro]] || [[word:chajovojoro|chajovojoro]] || [[word:chajovoshoro|chajovoshoro]] || [[word:chajovokoro|chajovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
